source: historical high-resolution acquisition — feasibility reconnaissance probes
scope: RECON ONLY — real probes to assess feasibility before deciding engineering investment. NOT a crawler.

environment.network: Bash egress works: DIRECT reaches CN hosts (baidu.com 200); Clash proxy 127.0.0.1:7897 reaches international (web.archive.org). No global proxy set.
environment.trends_tool: pytrends present but urllib3 2.7 incompat (method_whitelist removed); worked with retries=0.

google_trends.method: pytrends via Clash proxy, geo=CN, keyword 躺平; measured cadence (median day-step) + point count

high_volume_test.note: two independent 0-100 daily windows align exactly after mean-scaling when the peak (window max) is shared across both windows

stitching_noise.low_volume_test: NOT MEASURED (Trends proxy flakiness timed out); expected higher — 0-100 integer quantization loses resolution as daily level → single digits

google_trends.verdict: FEASIBLE for 10-year DAILY on KNOWN keywords (stitched ≤9mo windows, standard pytrends.dailydata). Solves the TIME wall, NOT the coverage wall (needs a keyword list). Rate-limited (SSL/429 flakes observed under proxy).
google_trends.grade: E1 (measured cadence) + E2 (stitching-noise estimate, high-volume only)

wayback_machine.method: CDX API via proxy; collapse=timestamp:8 → count distinct archived DAYS per year 2015-2025; content check on one 2020 Weibo snapshot

content_extractability.evidence: CSS class 'td-02' (hot-search ranking item) appears 51× ; '热搜' present. Archived pages contain the real top-~50 list, NOT empty JS shells.

wayback_machine.verdict: OPEN + content extractable, but coverage HEAVILY uneven: 2015-2016 near-empty (3-16 days/yr = unusable for daily), 2020 spike (COVID archiving surge, ~76% of days), 2023-2025 decay (10-57 days/yr). Best asset = 2019-2022 hot-search reconstruction. Solves BOTH walls partially (hot-search = unknown-meme discovery + time) but only where archived.

result.message: 疑似存在异常访问行为 (anti-crawl / login wall)

baidu_index.verdict: AUTH + ANTI-CRAWL WALLED. Daily data exists (docs: back to ~2011) but requires logged-in account + Cipher-Text request signing + rate-limit handling. Feasible-with-engineering, KNOWN keywords only.
baidu_index.grade: E1 (auth wall confirmed) + E3 (span/daily from docs, not tested)

weibo_index.verdict: LOGIN WALLED. Retrospective span limited (recent years). Auth required.

bilibili_search_api.verdict: ANTI-CRAWL (wbi signature + cookies required). Historical timestamped videos retrievable WITH signing + cookies + rate-limit. Existing scraper.py handles B站 live; historical bulk needs signed requests.

weibo_posts.method: not directly probed (s.weibo.com search is login-walled + only ~recent)
weibo_posts.verdict: Post-level Weibo history heavily restricted (login + short retrospective window + anti-crawl). Wayback of hot-search PAGES is the better route for Weibo history than post search.
weibo_posts.grade: E3 (from known reality, not freshly probed)
